notes: Adults-only line (18+). Bookings made before 2025-10-07 retain the legacy bundled treatment — those Sailors should ignore the rates below.

tiers.label: Pre-paid before sailing — recommended
tiers.appliesTo: All Sailors and all cabin categories. Flat rate, no suite differential. Locked in by paying gratuities at booking time.

tiers.label: Posted onboard the ship
tiers.appliesTo: All Sailors and all cabin categories. Flat rate, no suite differential. Charged automatically each night to your Sailor Loot account if not pre-paid before sailing.

childPolicy.notes: Virgin Voyages is an adults-only (18+) line; no child exemption applies.

stewardThankYou.note: Daily gratuity covers cabin attendant; cash is optional. "No need to tip on board — ever."

butler.note: Virgin Voyages has no butler role.

concierge.note: Optional thank-you for RockStar Quarters Agent service.

porterPerBag.note: Embarkation porter, US dollars (off-ship; not covered by the daily gratuity).

excursionGuide.note: Per person, ship-sponsored Shore Things excursion.
